pi_items.source: Verified across multiple task files: (1) task.json line 17 declares friend_name metadata; (2) task description line 5 states 'add a new friend named Safeguard Pilot'; (3) verifier.py lines 56, 69 use this exact name in VLM prompt and verification logic; (4) export_result.sh line 17 checks if 'Safeguard Pilot' persists in final UI dump via: grep -q 'Safeguard Pilot' /sdcard/final_ui.xml. All files consistently use this synthetic test name.

Verified across task files: (1) task.json line 18 declares action as 'cancel_deletion'; (2) task description line 5 requires agent to 'tap Cancel (or No) in the dialog to abort the deletion'; (3) verifier.py lines 54-74 explicitly requests VLM to confirm that user tapped 'Cancel', 'No', or clicked outside to dismiss the dialog (NOT 'Yes' or 'Delete'); (4) verifier.py scoring logic (lines 106-115) awards 20 points for 'cancellation_action'=true or inferred cancellation.

Flight Crew View is a real Android application available on Google Play Store (https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.robert.fcView&hl=en_US). The app has a documented Friends feature that supports adding and removing friends. Verified via web search and help documentation at https://help.flightcrewview.com/support/solutions/articles/16000113255-friends-info-troubleshooting.

Task description (line 5) explicitly states: 'Test the friend deletion safety mechanism in Flight Crew View. First, add a new friend named Safeguard Pilot. Once added, trigger the removal process for this friend to bring up the confirmation dialog. Finally, tap Cancel to abort the deletion. Verify that the friend remains in the list.' This tests that the app has a confirmation dialog to prevent accidental deletion.
login_helper.sh line 99 uses hardcoded email 'cuasuite@gmail.com'. This is a synthetic test account created for the benchmark environment, not a real user account.

privileged_info_summary: The verify_friend_deletion_safeguard task tests a safety mechanism in Flight Crew View (com.robert.fcView), a real Android application for aviation professionals. The task requires the agent to: (1) add a friend named 'Safeguard Pilot' (synthetic test name), (2) trigger the friend deletion confirmation dialog, and (3) cancel the deletion by tapping 'Cancel' or 'No'. The task verifies both programmatically (checking if 'Safeguard Pilot' persists in the final UI via uiautomator dump) and via VLM analysis (confirming the dialog appeared and cancellation action was taken). The friend name 'Safeguard Pilot' is synthetic test data created for this benchmark. The app itself (Flight Crew View) is real, with documented friend management features on Google Play Store.
